positive: Stylized minimalist vector art of a mountain range silhouette overlaid with abstract celestial nebula patterns. The composition must be perfectly centered and symmetrical, featuring sharp, clean lines and strong, defined edges suitable for screen printing. Utilize a high-contrast, limited palette of deep indigo, matte black, and electric teal gradient accents, giving a glowing, ethereal appearance. The overall aesthetic should be graphic, modern, and highly symmetrical, resembling negative space art on apparel.
negative: blurry, artifacts, text, watermarks, grainy, out of focus, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noisy, low detail, low contrast, amateur, photographic, hyperrealistic, logo, signature
